items.title: ‘My adventure comes to an end’ – World Cup manager, 57, resigns just 18 DAYS after being appointed
items.summary: A WORLD CUP manager appointed just 18 days ago has abruptly resigned. The 57-year-old announced his departure on Instagram on Saturday night. items.title: Verstappen: No point racing in British GP if Red Bull can't fix top-speed issue
items.summary: Max Verstappen says there is "no point competing" in Sunday's British Grand Prix if his Red Bull team cannot fix an issue that limited his top speed during qualifying.
